title: Limitations of Liability: The Civil Code of Quebec allows for punitive damages in...
summary: Assess whether the Civil Code of Quebec allows punitive damages in all civil liability cases.
prompt: The Civil Code of Quebec allows for punitive damages in all civil liability cases.
solution: Punitive damages are not generally available under Quebec law unless specified by a particular statute. The Civil Code of Quebec does not create a general right to punitive damages in all cases of civil liability.
